EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
SCOTLAND-WEST COAST.
NGA CHART 35075 (2ND ED).
DEPTHS REPORTED:
A. 16.2 METRES 57-49.9N 007-23.0W.
B. 14.3 METRES 57-53.2N 007-17.5W.
C. 29.3 METRES 57-58.9N 007-21.0W.

    THAN CHARTED EXIST IN THIS AREA
    AND EASTWARDS TO ISLE OF LEWIS.
